Readability + selection polish for the accent colour.

### Changed
- Selected track/file rows now use the **full** accent colour (was a darker tint) — the highlight matches the colour you picked (`#FFE000` looks like `#FFE000`).
- **Auto-contrast text**: text and icons on accent surfaces (selection, buttons) switch to dark on light accents and light on dark accents (LESS `contrast()`), so bright accents stay readable.

### Update
Download `Flat Monkey Dark.mmip` below → MediaMonkey **Tools > Add-ons > Add…** → re-select **Flat Monkey Dark** under Options > Skin.
